allow: Bash(python -c "import engine, main; print\('imports OK'\); print\('functions:', hasattr\(engine,'analyze_all'\), hasattr\(engine,'budget_fit'\), hasattr\(engine,'append_log_entry'\)\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\tingy\\projects\\stocks"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","api:app","--port","8000" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health"; Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "health failed: $_" })

PowerShell($cfg = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/config"; Write-Output "CONFIG tickers: $\($cfg.tickers.Count\), period: $\($cfg.period\), oldest cache: $\($cfg.cache.oldest_hours\)h"; Write-Output "---"; $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/holdings"; Write-Output "HOLDINGS positions: $\($h.positions.Count\), annual div: $\($h.currency\) $\($h.total_annual_div\), errors: $\($h.errors.Count\)"; foreach\($e in $h.errors\){ Write-Output "  err: $e" })

PowerShell($start = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/analyze" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"use_cache": true, "ttl_hours": 6}'; $jid = $start.job_id; Write-Output "job: $jid"; $done = $false; $tries = 0; while\(-not $done -and $tries -lt 120\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $j = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/job/$jid"; Write-Output "  [$\($j.done\)/$\($j.total\)] $\($j.status\) - $\($j.message\)"; if\($j.status -eq 'done' -or $j.status -eq 'error'\){ $done = $true }; $tries++ }; if\($j.status -eq 'done'\){ Write-Output "RESULTS: $\($j.result.results.Count\) stocks ranked. Top 3:"; $j.result.results | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.ticker\) score=$\($_.score\) eff=$\($_.effective_score\) $\($_.currency\)$\($_.price\)" } } else { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($j.error\)" })

PowerShell($b1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/budget" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"budget": 1000, "only_actionable": true}'; if\($b1.pick\){ $p=$b1.pick; Write-Output "BUDGET RM1000 -> BUY $\($p.lots\) lot\(s\) of $\($p.ticker\) @ $\($p.currency\)$\($p.price\) = $\($p.currency\)$\($p.total_outlay\) \(fee $\($p.fee_pct\)%\) | left $\($p.currency\)$\($p.leftover\)"; Write-Output "  reason: $\($p.reason\)"; Write-Output "  actionable: $\($p.is_actionable\) | $\($p.timing_verdict\) | $\($p.eh_label\)" } else { Write-Output "no pick: $\($b1.message\)" }; Write-Output "---test prefer a specific ticker---"; $b2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/budget" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"budget": 500, "prefer": "5176.KL"}'; if\($b2.pick\){ Write-Output "PREFER 5176.KL @ RM500 -> $\($b2.pick.lots\) lot\(s\) = $\($b2.pick.currency\)$\($b2.pick.total_outlay\)" })

PowerShell($before = \(Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/log/buy"\).Count; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/log/buy" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"month":"2026-06","ticker":"1023.KL","price":7.35,"currency":"RM","lots":1}'; $after = $r.log.Count; Write-Output "log/buy: before=$before after=$after ok=$\($r.ok\)"; Write-Output "last entry: $\($r.log[-1] | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; Write-Output "---test validation rejects bad input---"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/log/buy" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"month":"2026-06","ticker":"X","price":-5,"currency":"RM","lots":1}' } catch { Write-Output "correctly rejected negative price: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })
Bash(python -c "import importlib, api; importlib.reload\(api\); print\('api imports OK'\)")
